title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 451.150 - Licenses to be recorded — fee
text:
451.150.  Licenses to be recorded — fee. — The recorder shall record all marriage licenses issued in a well-bound book kept for that purpose, with the return thereon, for which he shall receive a fee of ten dollars to be paid for by the person obtaining the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 3366, A.L. 1972 H.B. 1447, A.L. 1986 H.B. 931, A.L. 1987 H.B. 384 Revision) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2979; 1919 § 7304; 1909 § 8285 
Effective 6-15-87 
Recorder to keep index of marriage contracts and marriage certificates, 59.450 
Recording fees, 193.195
